name: IdsDmProdDmBnfSumDtlExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT MAP2.TRGT_CD AS SRC_SYS_CD, PC.PROD_ID, BS.BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD_SK, PC.PROD_CMPNT_EFF_DT_SK, PC.PROD_CMPNT_TERM_DT_SK, BS.COINS_PCT_AMT, BS.COPAY_AMT, BS.DEDCT_AMT, BS.LMT_AMT, BS.PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID, LKP.TRGT_CD AS DET_TYP_CD, LKP.TRGT_CD_NM AS DE_TYP_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.BNF_SUM_DTL BS JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROD_CMPNT PC ON PC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = BS.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND PC.PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID = BS.PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG MAP1 ON MAP1.CD_MPPNG_SK = PC.PROD_CMPNT_TYP_CD_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG MAP2 ON MAP2.CD_MPPNG_SK = PC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG LKP ON LKP.CD_MPPNG_SK = BS.BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD_SK WHERE MAP1.TRGT_CD = 'BSBS') SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, PROD_ID, CASE WHEN DET_TYP_CD IS NULL THEN 'UNK' ELSE DET_TYP_CD END AS BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD, PROD_CMPNT_EFF_DT_SK + '-00:00:00:00' AS PROD_CMPNT_EFF_DT, CASE WHEN DE_TYP_NM IS NULL THEN 'UNK' ELSE DE_TYP_NM END AS BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_NM, PROD_CMPNT_TERM_DT_SK + '-00:00:00:00' AS PROD_CMPNT_TERM_DT, COINS_PCT_AMT AS BNF_SUM_DTL_COINS_PCT_AMT, COPAY_AMT AS BNF_SUM_DTL_COPAY_AMT, DEDCT_AMT AS BNF_SUM_DTL_DEDCT_AMT, LMT_AMT AS BNF_SUM_DTL_LMT_AMT, PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM cte

Description:
*****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************
COPYRIGHT 2009 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 



                           
PROCESSING:
                    Extracts from IDS and pulls to the Data Marts.  Perform no changes with the data.


Developer                          Date                    Project/Altiris #                     Change Description                                                                                                             Development Project               Code Reviewer                      Date Reviewed
---------------------------------      -------------------      -----------------------------------           ---------------------------------------------------------                                                                                       ----------------------------------              ---------------------------------               -------------------------
Ralph Tucker                  2009-05-21       3500 - Web Realign             New Etl                                                                                                                                    devlIDSnew                               Steph Goddard                      05/28/2009 
Bhoomi Dasari                 2009-08-10       3500                                     Removed date criteria for history                                                                                              devlIDSnew                              Steph Goddard                       08/11/2009
SAndrew                         2009-08-12       3500                                     removed keys in middle of extract, ordered according to output, standardized 
                                                                                                             removed dates not longer used since full pull now
                                                                                                              changed table update mode from replace existing rows completely to insert new / update existing

Leandrew Moore              06/11/2013       5114                                 Reqrite in Parallel                                                                                                                       IntegrateWrhsDevl                    Jag Yelavarthi                        2013-08-12

Annotations:
Pull the matched set of products fron IDS and move to DATA MART.
Read from source table PROD from IDS.  Apply Run Cycle filters when applicable to get just the needed rows forward
Code SK lookups for Denormalization

Once the SK is used for denormalization, do not carry over that information if it is not needed in the target table.
This is a load ready file conforms to the target table structure.

Write this into a Dataset if the data goes into a PKEY job otherwise write this info into a Sequential file

Please use Metadata available in Table definitions to support data Lineage.
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
